title: Impact variations
wikitext:
[]: Impact variations             Quote Post by Sorrow » Sun Jul 06, 2014 2:12 am I realise this is probably a valueless topic to the vast majority of people by now, and is most likely well established to most; however, after reading the appropriate--or so I think--wiki sections and re-watching the series I just wasn't sure if I really understood how and what would occur to be a third impact. If the angels come into contact with Adam then the humans will be wiped out; leaving the Earth for Adam based life. It seems evident to me that Tabris knew this to be true and Seele convinced him that this is what humans want. It turns out he was deceived by Seele and of course the giant under Nerv was actually Lilith. This would have caused instrumentality, presumably. Therefore, were it Adam, like Kaworu believed, the end result must have been different--why else would Seele deceive him?--and would not have meant instrumentality for Lilin based life but simply their destruction instead? Seeing as the Evas can come into contact with Lilith, though, and produce no effect, it seems to be a lie that anything would have happened if an Angel did meet Lilith. But it seems they were looking for Adam, and that is probably what would have caused something to occur. Why else would something without the fruit of knowledge seek out Adam? It must have been innate to them. Given this, it seems to me that: An angel coming into contact with Adam will destroy Lilin based life and give Earth to Adam based life. Adam coming into contact with Lilith (forbidden union) resets all life. Is that instrumentality? Are the angels included in this - assuming they weren't wiped out prior to this? Now, when it comes to Seele's "artificial" third impact, I think it goes something like this: Eva 01 replaces the need for Lilith's body to be present -- Uh.... but then why the need for only one Lilith clone but nine Adam clones? I thought I understood it well enough, but every point I tried to make, it just raised more questions. Did Seele know themselves it was Lilith under Nerv HQ? If Gendo had Adam's embryo, what were they making the Adam based Evas from? Are the souls of Adam and Lilith required or only their bodies? If the souls are required--hence the need to keep Lilith's soul safe, though separate, in the form of Rei--then was Adam's soul salvaged by Gendo after Shinji killed Kaworu? How could the mass produced Evas substitute Adam and Eva 01 substitute Lilith without the Lilith/Adam souls? It's the only thing in the series that doesn't seem absolutely clear in how it works. I was hoping I'd explain it all relatively well and someone could tidy the edges for me, but my post just ended up being a stream of consciousness as I was trying to make sense of it. So I suppose now I'm looking for someone to explain it to me or have a discussion about it. I do apologise for this mess...

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Jul 06, 2014 9:15 am Useful threads on this topic: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/8742/NGE2-Alternate-Outcome-Translations-3I-Etc/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/14932/Impact-Events-and-the-People-Who-Drive-Them/ The first is directly on point, since it specifically looks at other scenarios and is based on official material. The second is just speculation based on said material.

[]:             Quote Post by Sorrow » Sun Jul 06, 2014 2:07 pm Thanks for the links. Your part about Yui's intent was quite interesting, actually. I was more interested, however, in the "natural" causes for third impact. Luckily there was a nice chunk dedicated to that. It seems to me that when humans contacted Adam, he proceeded to destroy Lilin life during second impact, before he was shut down again in some way. So it seems to say that when Lilith based life contacts the Angel seed, that acts like a "virus alert" and proceeds to try and eradicate the opposite life forms. Surely then by the same token, had the Angel/Adam based life reached the opposite seed, it would have worked in the opposite? Lilith would have recognised the foreign life forms and proceeded to destroy them? Given that during second impact Adam gave birth to his own progenitors and wiped out a good portion of Lilith's, these kinds of impacts would not be detrimental to life forms of the seed in power, the seed that had been made aware of the other's presence. Now, it seems evident to me that for this to happen, the soul also has to be in the seed body and the contactor must also possess a soul of the opposite kind, for a lifeless body has no will to act upon, triggering nothing. Does that then imply that Gendo was in possession of Adam's soul (after Kaworu was killed) also? I think it must. It also seems to agree with you that Seele had no idea that Lilith's soul was removed from her. Now we have the 3rd kind of "natural" impact. The forbidden union of Adam and Lilith's souls AND bodies. Will this simply revert ALL life, of both kinds, back to its most primal condition? I think it would, but Adam was repressed (being embryonic, having just "died" and also not to forget Adam's soul had gained an attachment to Lilin kind through Kaworu and Shinji, he probably allowed Rei's plan of leaving it up to Shinji based on that) and Rei/Lilith taking charge only to pass the choice to Shinji. That is the more complex third impact that we end up with. I think that outlines the 3 different variations of contacting seeds and causing life to be sent back to the white/black moon. On another, maybe off topic note, you mentioned there being possibly more Angel souls yet unreleased. However I don't think there would be, and if there were I doubt there would be many more. The Angel based life are already incredibly powerful compared to humans and have the potential for infinite life. I think their numbers are intended to be few as opposed the billions of weak and transient Lilin life. They have more powerful souls, indefinite life and are incredibly powerful physically, it stands to reason they wouldn't have the numbers of the weak, short lived and co-dependent Lilin. The Lilin collectively probably amount to the power of an Angel by working together. That is why they live in groups and need to work in number to achieve anything, while the Angels are never seen, even once, working in unison; their fourteen souls are probably the equivalent of all the billions of Lilin and one soul is the equivalent of an entire group of Lilin. There may be more Angels Adam couldn't release before second impact ended, but I bet the amount is quite insignificant. Just my opinion, though it's worth nothing. Also, didn't Seele's Dead Sea Scrolls outline the number and name of the Angels that were to be born?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Jul 07, 2014 9:54 am Sorrow wrote: I think that outlines the 3 different variations of contacting seeds and causing life to be sent back to the white/black moon.

[]:             Quote Post by Sorrow » Mon Jul 07, 2014 12:28 pm I really don't know what to add here, since my take on this was covered in the Impact Events thread. If you have something specific in mind from that thread I can maybe elaborate or clarify, but it describes how and why Impacts happen as I understand them.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Jul 07, 2014 4:46 pm Sorrow wrote: Post script:- Out of curiosity, what does P3II mean, or something like that. I just remember seeing it and not being able to decipher it. I've had no problem with the other acronyms people use around here.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Jul 07, 2014 4:59 pm Most people just call it Pre-Instrumentality. Technically, Instrumentality never happened in EoE. It started and Shinji rejected it before everyone merged into a hive mind. Lilith was just kind of holding everybody before mashing them together.
